headline: Amgen vs. NovoCure: Which Health Care Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Amgen posts strong profits and cash flow, while NovoCure pursues growth with a direct-to-patient cancer therapy model and leaner balance sheet.

headline: CAH Stock Up Nearly 8% YTD: Will the Uptrend Continue in the Rest of 2026?
summary: Cardinal Health has gained nearly 8% in 2026 as specialty pharma growth, rising EPS, and expanding healthcare services fuel investor optimism.
